suites.failure: TranscriptViewerOverlay emits lines wider than a 20-column render width.

suites.command: bun --cwd packages/coding-agent test test/transcript-viewer-overlay.test.ts test/turn-jump.test.ts test/transcript-item-registry.test.ts

adversarialCases.evidence: 20 j/k/escape cycles on an empty viewer retained undefined selection, rendered the empty state, and invoked close 20 times.
Expanded and paged a 10,000-line entry; repeated j/k clamped at first/last entries and fullscreen rendered content.
copyable:false prevented y/Y clipboard calls; r on plain text and Enter from collapsed state did not throw and entered fullscreen.
render(20) with an unbroken entry produced at least one ANSI-stripped line wider than 20 columns.
Synthetic JSONL observed-session fixture exercised navigation, expansion, session cycling, and escape close through SessionObserverOverlayComponent.
Interleaved jumps did not wrap at the end; eviction reset selection to current anchors; a failed reveal retried the same anchor without position advancement.
app.transcript.browse was unavailable for an empty message list and executed safely for a nonempty list.

Static call-path review: built-in /transcript directly invokes showTranscriptViewer, InteractiveMode always delegates to SelectorController, and SelectorController always calls ui.showOverlay with no open-overlay guard. Repeating /transcript can stack transcript overlays.

blockers.title: TranscriptViewerOverlay violates narrow-width rendering contract
blockers.repro: Run bun --cwd packages/coding-agent test test/g002-ws1-redteam.test.ts. The 'renders content within a 20-column viewport' assertion fails. transcript-viewer-overlay.ts renders borders at the requested width but preview content is only sliced using resolveTerminalColumns(), while expanded Markdown has a minimum 40-column render width.

blockers.title: Repeated /transcript or browse action can open stacked overlays
blockers.repro: With a nonempty interactive session, invoke /transcript twice before closing the first viewer. builtin-registry.ts handleTui calls showTranscriptViewer each time; interactive-mode.ts rebuilds/delegates unconditionally; selector-controller.ts showTranscriptViewer unconditionally calls ui.showOverlay and replaces focus without retaining or checking an existing transcript viewer handle.
